richData.headline: Polymarket Files for Crypto Token Trademarks as Legal Battles Mount
richData.summary: The prediction market has filed trademark applications for POLY and $POLY tied to a digital token and crypto trading services.

richData.headline: 'Massive consolidation' expected across crypto industry: Bullish CEO
richData.summary: The crypto industry is about to get a wakeup call, as many companies will realize "they don’t have businesses, they have products," says Bullish CEO Tom Farley.

richData.headline: Jack Dorsey’s Block may cut up to 10% of staff in business overhaul: Report
richData.summary: Analysts forecast Block to post $403 million in Q4 profit on $6.25 billion revenue, following a third quarter marked by strong gross profit growth but mixed market reaction.

richData.headline: OpenAI and Anthropic Roll Out Rival AI Models as Competition for Enterprise Heats Up
richData.summary: OpenAI and Anthropic released new flagship AI models within hours of each other on Thursday, with benchmark results suggesting they're optimized for different strengths.

richData.headline: Over 23% of traders now expect interest rate cut at next FOMC meeting
richData.summary: The number of traders expecting a rate cut at the March Federal Open Market Committee meeting rose following fears of a hawkish Fed nominee.

richData.headline: Bitcoin under $70K gives institutions a ‘new crack of the apple’: Bitwise CEO
richData.summary: Bitcoin is in a bear market and is “getting swept up” with the rest of the macro assets, Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley declared during a television interview.

richData.headline: Here’s what happened in crypto today
richData.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

richData.headline: Pudgy Penguins Hit New York City With Valentine's Day Pop-Up Event
richData.summary: Crypto-native brand Pudgy Penguins is hosting a pop-up Valentine's Day event in New York City, complete with a plush bouquet.

richData.headline: Bessent suggests Warsh nomination hearings alongside Powell probe
richData.summary: The Fed chair confirmation faces a key hurdle as a senator vows to block the process until a DOJ investigation into Jerome Powell is resolved.

richData.headline: Waymo’s ‘Self-Driving’ Claims Called into Question on Capitol Hill
richData.summary: Senators pressed Waymo over its use of human operators in the Philippines, questioning whether autonomy still means what Waymo says it does.

richData.headline: Crypto Exchange Gemini Slashes Jobs Amid Exit From Europe, Australia
richData.summary: Publicly traded crypto exchange Gemini is exiting foreign markets and laying off around 25% of its staff to improve its path to profitability.

richData.headline: FDIC Agrees to Pay Fees, Drop FOIA Fight Over Crypto 'Pause Letters'
richData.summary: The banking regulator will revise transparency policies to settle Coinbase's "Operation Choke Point 2.0" lawsuit.

richData.headline: XRP Leads Crypto Losses as Ethereum, Dogecoin Prices Crater Alongside Bitcoin
richData.summary: XRP crashes 15% as crypto markets plunge into "Extreme Fear" territory, wiping out over $1.4 billion in value for traders.

richData.headline: Crypto-focused Erebor wins first new US bank charter of Trump’s second term: WSJ
richData.summary: Erebor doubled its valuation to $4 billion after a $350 million Lux Capital-led funding round late last year.

richData.headline: Tom Lee's BitMine Hits 7-Month Stock Low as Ethereum Paper Losses Reach $8 Billion
richData.summary: Shares in publicly traded Ethereum treasury firm BitMine Immersion Technologies have fallen to a seven-month low as unrealized losses mount.
